title: Advanced Nesting Patterns
description: Optimize complex CSS using advanced nesting: media queries inside selectors, @layer nesting, and combining with :is()/:has()

Dashboard

Overview Analytics Settings

Widget

Widget content.

hints.text: Modern CSS nesting allows media queries inside selectors, keeping responsive styles co-located with the component they modify.
Nest everything inside .dashboard { }. Put @media queries inside each element's rule block, right next to the styles they override.
One top-level .dashboard rule with all children and their media queries nested inside.
